################################################
#                 MadDM v. 3.2                 #
################################################


################################################
# Relic Density                                #
################################################

Omegah2                       = 6.00e-02
Omegah_Planck                 = 1.20e-01
xsi                           = 5.00e-01 	 # xsi = (Omega/Omega_Planck)
x_f                           = 2.50e+01
sigmav_xf                     = 8.42e-27 	 # cm^3 s^-1
# % of the relic density channels
%_chichibar_bbx               = 85.00 %
%_chichibar_ttx               = 10.00 %
%_chichibar_wphm              = 5.00 %


################################################
# Direct Detection [cm^2]                      #
################################################

Xenon1T_2018_SI               = [1.23e-45,3.40e-46]   # XENON1T 2018 (SI)
Xenon1T_2018_SD_neutron       = [5.50e-42,5.67e-42]   # XENON1T 2018 (SD)


################################################
# Indirect Detection                           #
################################################
# Results in brackets display [prediction, upper limit]

# Annihilation cross section computed with the method: madevent
# <sigma v>[cm^3 s^-1] of continuum spectrum final states and Fermi dSph limits (if available, else -1)
chichibar_bbx                 = [1.99e-26,3.00e-25]
chichibar_ttx                 = [2.34e-27,3.00e-25]

# <sigma v>[cm^3 s^-1] of line spectrum final states and Fermi LAT 2015 line limits (if available, else -1)]
chichibar_za                  = [1.20e-30,2.30e-29]

# Global Fermi dSph Limit computed with pythia8 spectra
Total_xsec                    = [2.34e-26,3.00e-25]
Fermi_Likelihood              = -1.23e+01
Fermi_pvalue                  = 4.50e-02
Fermi_Likelihood(Thermal)     = -8.70e+00
Fermi_pvalue(Thermal)         = 1.23e-01
